parameters.query:
WITH picked AS (
    SELECT id
    FROM outbox
    WHERE status = 'pending'
      AND channel = 'telegram'
    ORDER BY created_at ASC
    LIMIT 1
    FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
),
updated AS (
    UPDATE outbox o
    SET status = 'sending'
    FROM picked
    WHERE o.id = picked.id
    RETURNING
        o.id AS outbox_id,
        o.intake_event_id,
        o.candidate_id,
        o.channel,
        o.recipient,
        o.message_type,
        o.body,
        o.reply_markup,
        o.metadata,
        o.status
)
SELECT
    updated.*,
    bc.bot_token
FROM updated
JOIN bot_credentials bc
    ON bc.bot_code = 'hr_assistant';

WITH updated AS (
    UPDATE outbox
    SET
        status = 'sent',
        sent_at = now()
    WHERE id = '{{ $("Build context after outbox").first().json.outbox_id }}'
    RETURNING
        id,
        intake_event_id,
        candidate_id,
        recipient,
        message_type,
        body,
        metadata,
        status,
        sent_at
),
logged AS (
    SELECT log_processing_event(
        'delivery_worker',
        updated.intake_event_id,
        'response_sent',
        updated.status,
        'Telegram response sent and outbox marked as sent',
        NULL,
        1
    )
    FROM updated
)
SELECT
    updated.id AS outbox_id,
    updated.intake_event_id,
    updated.candidate_id,
    updated.recipient,
    updated.message_type,
    updated.body,
    updated.metadata,
    updated.status,
    updated.sent_at
FROM updated
CROSS JOIN logged;

WITH updated AS (
    UPDATE outbox
    SET
        status = 'error',
        error_text = '{{ JSON.stringify($json).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
    WHERE id = '{{ $("Build context after outbox").first().json.outbox_id }}'
    RETURNING id, intake_event_id, candidate_id, status, error_text
),
logged AS (
    SELECT log_processing_event(
        'delivery_worker',
        updated.intake_event_id,
        'delivery_error',
        'error',
        'Telegram delivery failed for outbox_id=' || updated.id,
        updated.error_text,
        1
    )
    FROM updated
)
SELECT updated.id, updated.status, updated.error_text
FROM updated
CROSS JOIN logged;

SELECT log_processing_event(
    'delivery_worker',
    NULLIF('{{ $("Build TTS payload").first().json.intake_event_id || "" }}', '')::uuid,
    'tts_sent',
    'success',
    'TTS audio sent to Telegram',
    NULL,
    1
);

SELECT log_processing_event(
    'delivery_worker',
    NULLIF('{{ $("Build TTS payload").first().json.intake_event_id || "" }}', '')::uuid,
    'tts_error',
    'error',
    'TTS audio generation or delivery failed',
    '{{ JSON.stringify($json).replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    1
);

SELECT log_processing_event(
    'delivery_worker',
    NULLIF('{{ $("Build visual payload").first().json.intake_event_id || "" }}', '')::uuid,
    'visual_sent',
    'success',
    'Visual result card sent to Telegram',
    NULL,
    1
);

SELECT log_processing_event(
    'delivery_worker',
    NULLIF('{{ $("Build visual payload").first().json.intake_event_id || "" }}', '')::uuid,
    'visual_error',
    'error',
    'Visual result card generation or delivery failed',
    '{{ JSON.stringify($json).replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    1
);

parameters.jsCode:
const sent = $json;

const source = $('Build context after outbox').first().json || {};

const metadata = source.metadata || {};

return [{
  json: {
    ...source,
    ...sent,

    outbox_id: source.outbox_id,
    intake_event_id: source.intake_event_id,
    candidate_id: source.candidate_id,
    recipient: source.recipient,
    message_type: source.message_type,
    body: source.body,
    metadata,

    tts_required:
      metadata.tts_required === true ||
      metadata.tts_required === 'true',

    tts_text:
      metadata.tts_text ||
      source.body ||
      '',

    visual_required:
      metadata.visual_required === true ||
      metadata.visual_required === 'true',

    visual_prompt:
      metadata.visual_prompt ||
      source.body ||
      '',

    visual_title:
      metadata.visual_title ||
      null,

    visual_score:
      metadata.visual_score ?? null,

    visual_candidate_name:
      metadata.visual_candidate_name ||
      null,

    visual_vacancy_title:
      metadata.visual_vacancy_title ||
      null
  }
}];
